evals.prompt: Document why our login page shows a blank screen after the OAuth token expires — write it so our feature owner can understand without reading the code.
evals.expected_output: Plain-language report with problems explained in prose, no ticket ids, inline term explanations, and code-path or official-doc references only.

evals.prompt: Rewrite these requirement bullets in pt-BR for stakeholders: 'Implement circuit breaker on the payment API; retry with exponential backoff; surface degraded mode in the admin dashboard.'
evals.expected_output: pt-BR bullets using glossary-verified terms (no calques like 'gate' or literal 'circuit breaker' if glossary specifies otherwise), repository terms explained on first use.

evals.prompt: Polish the Requisitos and Critérios de Aceite for a user story about validating email and password on the login form — keep the three-part ticket shape.
evals.expected_output: work-item-prose sub-pass: ## Requisitos and ## Critérios de Aceite with WHAT-not-HOW bullets and testable checkboxes, no enricher emoji sections.
